title: Filtering, Three-Valued Logic, Patterns, Ordering, and Pagination · Data-System Transfer
summary: A queue view must include the correct unresolved tickets, handle missing owners, and remain deterministic across pages. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a deterministic queue-filter query suite with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine comparison, range, membership, and boolean predicates with explicit grouping.
Predict TRUE, FALSE, and UNKNOWN through comparisons and boolean operators involving NULL.
Use IS NULL, IS NOT NULL, COALESCE, and NULLIF only when their business meaning is justified.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.
